title: TheUndergrowth
description: To enhance the over-world without adding biomes, but instead reworking the already existing ones
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f62e728ccb8645bdbee73c4f4ab4054eb58db7f.png)

(BEING REWRITTEN CURRENTLY)

PLEASE UNDERSTAND THE OLDER VERSIONS OF UNDERGROWTH PRE 2.0 WILL NOT BE MAINTAINED. THIS MODPAGE WILL BE OVERHAULED POST 2.0

This message will be here until the mod is properly updated to 2.0 :D

------------------------------------------------------------------

2026 Updates:

This version of the undergrowth project has been discontinued due to being made in mcreator. The mod itself will be continued down the road after I gain some more skills within texturing, and development in intellij. 

I will be releasing a vanillia version of the worldgen changes i have made as well :3 I will note the later versions of this mod will be developed on 1.21.11+

mainly due to the fact of me learning development for those versions.


------------------------------------------------------------------
2026 May 15th Update:

Development is now rebegining with a clear goal of only adding small features to the overworld + new blocks
